stemHtml: If an orographic cloud descends down a slope, its temperature increases at…

options.a: a lower rate than in dry air, as evaporation, absorbs heat.
options.b: a lower rate than in dry air, as condensation gives out heat.
options.c: a higher rate than in dry air, as it gives up latent evaporation heat.
options.d: the same rate as if the air mass were dry.
